answer:
<think> The seventh Disney Vacation Club resort is Disney's Hilton Head Island Resort. I know this because I have access to information about all Disney Vacation Club resorts and their order of opening. The chalet-style building that was used for small and medium-sized business meetings at this resort was called the "Island Pavilion." I can look up the opening date of Disney's Hilton Head Island Resort and the Island Pavilion separately, but since the question asks for the opening date of the resort, I will assume that the question refers to the entire resort and not just the Island Pavilion. </think>

<answer> Disney's Hilton Head Island Resort opened on May 1, 1995. </answer>
